title: Block Rush
description: Welcome to Block Rush, a vibrant and addictive match-three puzzle game that will keep you entertained for hours. Match and blast your way through a variety of levels filled with colorful animal-themed blocks. With each match, you score points and clear the board, but be quick and strategic to reach the highest scores! Features: Engaging Levels: Enjoy numerous levels, each uniquely designed to challenge your matching and strategic skills. As you progress, the levels become more complex and exciting. Colorful Graphics: Immerse yourself in the vibrant and playful graphics that bring the animal-themed blocks to life.
instructions: How to Play Match Blocks Tap on groups of three or more adjacent blocks of the same color to match and blast them Score Points Each match scores points and clears the blocks from the board The larger the group of blocks the higher the score Strateg
